agent_intuitiveness.stdout_excerpt:
Work with GitHub repositories.
USAGE
  gh repo <command> [flags]
GENERAL COMMANDS
  create:      Create a new repository
  list:        List repositories owned by user or organization
...EXAMPLES
  $ gh repo create
  $ gh repo clone cli/cli
  $ gh repo view --web
agent_intuitiveness.note: bare invocation returns helpful help, exit 0
